scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:packages && bun run typecheck:services && bun run typecheck:apps
scripts.typecheck:packages: cd packages/types && bun run typecheck && cd ../config && bun run typecheck && cd ../db && bun run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:services: cd services/api && bun run typecheck && cd ../worker && bun run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:apps: cd apps/finances-panel && bun run typecheck && cd ../portal && bun run typecheck
scripts.test:packages: cd packages/types && bun run test && cd ../config && bun run test && cd ../db && bun run test
scripts.test:services: cd services/api && bun run test && cd ../worker && bun run test
